title: Power Series Solutions for Ordinary Differential Equations: Legendre's, Frobenius, and Bessel's Methods
description: Power Series Solutions About an Initial Point

frontMatter.title: Power Series Solutions for Ordinary Differential Equations: Legendre's, Frobenius, and Bessel's Methods
frontMatter.summary: Detailed lecture notes covering power series solutions for ODEs, including Legendre's Equation and Polynomials, the Frobenius method for regular singular points, and Bessel's Equation and Functions.
table_of_contents: Power Series Solutions About an Initial Point
Legendre's Equation and Power Series Solution
Frobenius Method: Extended Power Series Solutions
Cases for Roots of the Indicial Equation

key_formulas.name: Power Series Solution (general)
key_formulas.note: General form for series solutions around an ordinary point $x_0$.

key_formulas.name: Legendre's Equation
key_formulas.note: A second-order linear ODE frequently arising in physics and engineering.

key_formulas.name: Legendre's Recurrence Relation
key_formulas.note: Relates coefficients of the power series solution to Legendre's equation.

key_formulas.name: Rodrigues' Formula for Legendre Polynomials
key_formulas.note: Explicit formula for Legendre polynomials of degree $n$.

key_formulas.name: Orthogonality of Legendre Polynomials
key_formulas.formula: $$\int_{-1}^1 P_m(x) P_n(x) dx = \begin{cases} 0 & \text{if } m \neq n \\ \frac{2}{2n+1} & \text{if } m = n \end{cases}$$
key_formulas.note: Fundamental orthogonality property over the interval $[-1, 1]$.

key_formulas.name: Frobenius Method Solution Form
key_formulas.note: Extended power series form for solutions around a regular singular point.

key_formulas.name: Frobenius Indicial Equation
key_formulas.note: Quadratic equation whose roots determine the exponents $r$ in the Frobenius series.

key_formulas.name: Frobenius Recurrence Relation
key_formulas.note: Determines coefficients for the Frobenius series solution.

key_formulas.name: Bessel's Equation
key_formulas.note: A second-order linear ODE with a regular singular point at $x=0$.

key_formulas.name: Bessel Function of the First Kind ($J_n(x)$)
key_formulas.note: A particular solution to Bessel's equation for integer order $n$.
